findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Finite.lean:161` and `:169` define the object/map projection lemmas; `mathlib/Mathlib/CategoryTheory/ObjectProperty/FullSubcategory.lean:62` has `@[simp] theorem ι_obj {X} : P.ι.obj X = X.obj := rfl`, and `:66` has `@[simp] theorem ι_map {X Y} {f : X ⟶ Y} : P.ι.map f = f.hom := rfl`.
findings.fix: Remove these specialized lemmas and use `ObjectProperty.ι_obj`/`ObjectProperty.ι_map` for `(ComoduleCat.isFG R C).FullSubcategory`.
findings.issue: `FGComoduleCat.forget₂_obj` and `FGComoduleCat.forget₂_map` duplicate the generic full-subcategory inclusion API.

summary: The finite comodule category itself is not duplicated, but the PR still adds specialized full-subcategory inclusion simp lemmas that Mathlib already provides generically.
